RouterFunction and handler components that expose the S3-compatible HTTP protocol. Includes S3ProxyRouter, S3SessionHandler, S3WebSupport, and all six handler components with registry dispatch in S3BucketConfigHandler.
using AWS CLI, SDK, curl, or
